title: Artificial intelligence detects high breast cancer risk in women given all
description: A new Australian artificial intelligence tool could transform breast cancer screening by offering a more personalised and accurate way to identify risk.
content:
An Australian-made artificial intelligence tool can detect women with a high likelihood of breast cancer who were otherwise missed in normal screening, according to new research.
